title: Patient Service Executive
description:
A boutique medical practice dedicated to serving a discerning global community of international and local patients, Osler Health delivers exceptional, personalised care with discretion and professionalism. From the first hello to the final farewell, every patient interaction matters — and our Patient Service Executives play a vital role in creating that experience.

We are looking for a polished, experienced professional to be the welcoming face and capable hands at the heart of our clinic. You will ensure a seamless patient journey while supporting our doctors and nurses in delivering outstanding care.

Key Responsibilities

  • Welcome patients and visitors, creating a warm and professional first impression
  • Manage appointment bookings, follow-ups, and confirmations with accuracy and care
  • Coordinate patient referrals to specialists and allied health providers
  • Answer phone calls, respond to messages, and handle patient enquiries with empathy and efficiency
  • Monitor and respond to clinic emails promptly
  • Register new patients, update medical records, and verify insurance information
  • Process payments, co-pays, and relevant fees discreetly and accurately
  • Support daily clinic operations with a variety of administrative tasks

About You

  • At least 3–5 years of experience in a receptionist, front-of-house, or customer service role — ideally within a medical, luxury hospitality, or high-touch service environment
  • Exceptional communication skills with a professional, polished manner and the ability to interact confidently with a diverse, discerning clientele
  • Demonstrated discretion, integrity, and the ability to handle sensitive information with the utmost confidentiality
  • Proficient in electronic medical record systems and comfortable with digital communication tools
  • Highly organised, detail-oriented, and able to anticipate needs in a fast-paced environment
  • A collaborative team player who takes pride in delivering an exceptional patient experience

Education

  • Diploma or higher qualification in business administration, healthcare administration, hospitality, or related field preferred
  • Equivalent experience in a high-touch service environment will also be considered

What We Offer

  • Competitive salary and benefits
  • Health insurance and paid time off
  • Opportunities for professional growth and development
  • A supportive, team-focused environment where your contribution is value
  • The chance to be part of a practice that truly cares for its patients — and its people
  • If you are motivated by excellence in service and enjoy making a positive difference in people’s healthcare experience, we would love to hear from you.

To apply, please send your resume and a cover letter to people@osler-group.com
We regret that only shortlisted candidates will be notified.

postedCompany.description:
ETC Healthcare is the parent company of Osler Health International which currently has 2 clinics in Singapore, one at Raffles Hotel Arcade and another at the Star Vista.


Osler Health International is a famly practice offering primary healthcare services to adults, teenagers, children and babies. 


More information about Osler Health can be found at www.osler-health.com
postedCompany.name: OSLER GROUP PTE. LTD.
